name: Stir-Fry Chicken & Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 pounds skinless, boneless chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 teaspoon cornstarch mixed with 2 tablespoons water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frying pan or wok, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add chicken cubes and stir-fry for 3 minutes, until the chicken turns opaque. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
2. Add broccoli; stir-fry for 1 to 2 minutes. Add mushrooms, scallions, soy sauce, sherry, and ginger. Stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes. Return the reserved chicken to the pan and add the dissolved cornstarch mixture. Cook until heated through and the sauce has thickened. Serve over rice.
Prep: 20 minutes
Cook: 20 minutes
Serves: 4
